# Test Database

The `GeoIP2-Country-Test.mmdb` file is a MaxMind DB format database used for testing.
It contains the following IP addresses and their corresponding country codes:

| IP Address      | Country Code | Country Name   |
|-----------------|--------------|----------------|
| 2a02:7b00::/32  | NL           | Netherlands    |
| 141.1.1.1/32    | DE           | Germany        |
| 2001:41d0::/32  | FR           | France         |
| 151.5.0.0/16    | IT           | Italy          |
| 217.65.48.0/24  | ES           | Spain          |
